Expected: 400 (= 1000 * 0.5 = 500, then - 100 deductible = 400)
Current error: expected 900 to be 400
Implementation file: /home/experimenter/experiments/runs/2026-05-15_03-50-02_claim-office-example-mapping_v4-exact-subagents_opus-4-7-no-thinking/src/claim-office.ts

Strategy: In claim's per-damage payout, look up the item from items by matching itemType. If matched item has enchantment >= 8, apply 50% to damage amount, then subtract deductible.

EXPERIMENT MODE: Run autonomously, proceed to Refactor after completion.

content.text: I'll analyze the failing test and implement minimal code to make it pass.
Now I understand. The current claim implementation just subtracts deductible. I need to add the enchantment >= 8 rule (50% then deductible). Let me make the minimal change.

content.text:
All 24 tests pass.

Green Phase Complete:
- Implementation: Added enchantment >= 8 lookup in claim() per-damage payout. For each damage, look up matching item by type. If found and enchantment >= 8, apply 50% to amount before subtracting deductible.
- Result: All tests now pass (24 passing, 17 todo)
- Approach: Minimal change - just added the lookup + conditional 50% rate for high enchantment items. Did not refactor existing logic, did not implement features for future tests (dragon material, caps, multiple swords, rounding all still todo).
